full_text:
Tian Feng (Yuanhao) 田豐 (元皓)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tian Feng (田豐), styledYuanhao (元皓), was born in Julu or Behai. Served Yuan Shao, who ignored his advice. Killed himself after being slandered by Feng Ji. Tian Feng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, the Han Fu Dynasty, and Yuan Shao. Tian Feng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
